meta.description: GRIP domain definitions with indicator mappings and weights
meta.weight_note: Per-domain indicator weights must sum to 1.0. Domain weights in escalation composite must sum to 1.0.
meta.normalization_note: All indicators normalized to 0-100 scale. Higher score = greater stress/risk.

domains.name: Energy Dependence
domains.description: Concentration risk and import dependency in energy supply

indicators.name: Electricity Import Ratio
indicators.description: Net imports / total consumption. Higher = more dependent.

indicators.name: Gas Import Source Concentration
indicators.description: HHI of gas import sources. Single-source = high concentration.

indicators.name: Estlink Utilization Rate
indicators.description: Average flow / total Estlink capacity. Near 1.0 = no headroom.

indicators.name: LNG Terminal Utilization
indicators.description: LNG sendout / terminal capacity. High utilization = low buffer.

indicators.name: Interconnectors Currently Offline
indicators.description: Count of major interconnectors currently in unplanned outage.

domains.name: Infrastructure Vulnerability
domains.description: Exposure and fragility of critical energy infrastructure

indicators.name: Interconnectors Currently Offline
indicators.description: Count of major interconnectors currently in unplanned outage.

indicators.name: N-1 Margin Deficit
indicators.description: Max(0, reserve_requirement - available_margin). Zero when margin adequate.

indicators.name: Submarine Cable Exposure Ratio
indicators.description: Fraction of import capacity carried by submarine cables.

indicators.name: Days Since Last Disruption (inverted)
indicators.description: Days since most recent interconnector outage. Low = recent event = elevated concern.

indicators.name: Cross-Border Flow Anomaly Score
indicators.description: Z-score deviation of current flows from 30-day rolling mean. Large negative = unusual drop.

indicators.name: Gas Flow Disruption Indicator
indicators.description: Z-score of gas flows vs 30-day mean. Abrupt drops flag disruption.

indicators.name: Telecom Cables Offline
indicators.description: Count of known Baltic telecom cable outages.

indicators.name: Alternative Route Availability (inverted)
indicators.description: Whether bypass routes exist for disrupted corridors. 0 = no alternative.

domains.name: Sanctions & Trade Pressure
domains.description: Economic coercion intensity affecting the corridor

indicators.name: Active Sanctions Entities (Baltic-relevant)
indicators.description: Count of EU-sanctioned entities relevant to Baltic energy/trade.

indicators.name: Trade Volume Change (HS 27xx)
indicators.description: Month-over-month change in mineral fuel trade volume.

indicators.name: Shadow Fleet Vessels in Baltic
indicators.description: Estimated count of shadow fleet vessels transiting Baltic Sea.

domains.name: Geopolitical Tension
domains.description: Regional diplomatic and security tension level

indicators.name: GDELT Event Intensity (Baltic+Russia)
indicators.description: Weekly count of conflict/coercion events involving Baltic + Russia actors.

indicators.name: GDELT Average Tone (Baltic+Russia)
indicators.description: Average media tone. Negative tone = elevated tension.

indicators.name: Diplomatic Incidents
indicators.description: Ambassador recalls, expulsions, protests from GDELT CAMEO codes.

domains.name: Alliance Alignment
domains.description: NATO and EU alliance cohesion and burden-sharing

indicators.name: Defense Spending (% GDP)
indicators.description: NATO guideline is 2%. Below 2% = below commitment.

indicators.name: NATO Exercise Frequency (Baltic region)
indicators.description: Count of NATO exercise events in Baltic region from GDELT.

indicators.name: UNGA Voting Alignment
indicators.description: Voting alignment between Baltic states and key NATO allies.

domains.name: Communications & Logistics Stress
domains.description: Strain on communications and transport networks

indicators.name: Telecom Cable Health Score
indicators.description: Fraction of known Baltic telecom cables operational.

indicators.name: Baltic Shipping Stress Proxy
indicators.description: Proxy for shipping disruption from insurance rate changes.

indicators.name: Cross-Border Transit Delays
indicators.description: Average delay at Baltic border crossings.

domains.name: Strategic Readiness
domains.description: Aggregate, non-operational defense posture and industrial capacity

indicators.name: Defense Spending Trend (3-year)
indicators.description: 3-year trend in defense spending. Declining = less prepared.

indicators.name: Reserve-to-Active Military Ratio
indicators.description: Ratio of reserve to active military personnel. Aggregate only.

indicators.name: Industrial Capacity Utilization
indicators.description: High utilization = less surge capacity for crisis response.

composite.name: Escalation Risk
composite.description: Weighted composite of domains 1-8 with velocity multiplier. Not independently scored from raw indicators.
composite.notes: composite = sum(w_i * score_i * min(1 + alpha * velocity_i, cap)). Velocity is 7-day rate of change normalized to points/day.
